title: The AI Capabilities Overhang

mentions.canonical_name: Google and Ipsos AI Usage Survey 2025
mentions.quoted_text: According to a new survey commissioned by Google and conducted by Ipsos, AI users are now in the majority. 66% of respondents said they had used AI in the past 12 months.
mentions.context_snippet: The survey polled around 1,000 adults from each of 21 countries in late September 2025.

mentions.quoted_text: XAI's Colossus 2 has now reached 1 gigawatt of capacity, becoming the first training cluster to cross that threshold.
mentions.context_snippet: Colossus 2 datacenter draws more power than the city of San Francisco and contains 550,000 Blackwell GPUs.
mentions.review_reason: Unclear if Colossus 2 is a software product, model, or hardware infrastructure; classified as 'other'.

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic and Amazon's new Carlisle datacenter is expected to hit 1 gigawatt sometime in the first quarter of this year.
mentions.context_snippet: Carlisle datacenter is close to Colossus 2 in power capacity and expected to reach 1 gigawatt soon.
mentions.review_reason: Unclear if datacenter is software or hardware infrastructure; classified as 'other'.

mentions.quoted_text: OpenAI's Stargate Abilene is expected to come online over the summer.
mentions.context_snippet: Stargate Abilene is an upcoming OpenAI datacenter expected in summer 2026.
mentions.review_reason: Unclear if Stargate Abilene is software or hardware infrastructure; classified as 'other'.

mentions.canonical_name: Elon Musk lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft
mentions.quoted_text: Elon Musk is seeking up to $134 billion in damages from OpenAI and Microsoft as his lawsuit heads to a trial.
mentions.context_snippet: Musk's lawyers argue entitlement to a portion of OpenAI's $500 billion valuation due to $38 million seed funding donation in 2015.
mentions.review_reason: Legal case, not a typical entity type; classified as 'other'.

notes: Classified datacenters and legal cases as 'other' due to taxonomy constraints.
Included only meaningful references central to claims or attribution.
No URLs invented; used provided URLs or null when unknown.
Sentiment labels assigned based on tone and context.
